creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
However, I must also say that with falkon (an other web browser with the same problem) I needed to specify --disable-gpu, while now I tried to remove it and everything works fine.
This might have many causes, but the fact that you cannot pass it to otter and that it has no effects on falkon could also be a hint that the --disable-gpu option for qt5-webengine does not exist anymore (there were qt5-webengine updates too since I proposed that solution). Thus it could be a good idea to verify that the option still exist.
